creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
I think tomahawk was broken by the qt-keychain update in ports r447066 as the output of the configure is:

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- The following REQUIRED packages could NOT be located on your system.
-- You must install these packages before continuing.
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
   * QtKeychain  <https://github.com/frankosterfeld/qtkeychain>
     Provides support for secure credentials storage




The mythtv issue seems also not taglib related, but let me check.
